Layout.name: FAT Theme Color

Calculation.Text: IsEmpty (FAT Title::Base project) Or IsEmpty (FAT Package::Local export type) Or notDeveloper
"View all media with subtitles in title"
"View all text styles defined in title"

StyledText.Data: Add new custom colors or edit existing. Change color names for clarification.

Calculation.Text: FAT Theme Color::Predefined Color Name = "primary" Or FAT Theme Color::Predefined Color Name = "interaction" Or FAT Theme Color::Predefined Color Name = "success" Or FAT Theme Color::Predefined Color Name = "fail"
"Check how many times this color is referenced in this Title"

StyledText.Data: Created by: <<FAT Theme Color::CreatedBy>> <<FAT Theme Color::CreationTimestamp>> • Modified by: <<FAT Theme Color::ModifiedBy>> <<FAT Theme Color::ModificationTimestamp>>
